active_stories.headline: Computer use research preview launched
active_stories.context: 845 upvotes in r/ClaudeAI, 517 in r/ClaudeCode. Community split on security implications. Potentially obsoletes Playwright/Puppeteer for many use cases.

active_stories.headline: Usage limit complaints flooding r/ClaudeCode
active_stories.context: Multiple reports of quotas jumping 50-80% in single messages on Max plan. Anthropic acknowledged but not resolved.

active_stories.headline: Five levels of Claude Code framework
active_stories.context: Most users plateau at level 2-3. The gap is CLAUDE.md with explicit behavioral rules vs vague project descriptions.

active_stories.headline: Claude Code can now /dream
active_stories.context: the feature is called Auto Dream. the idea: Claude Code already has Auto Memory (the agent writes notes based on your corrections), but memory alone is reactive. /dream lets the agent periodically ste

troll_of_the_day.topic: u/svachalek, 374 upvotes, responding to the "devs are worried about the wrong thing" post.

best_comment.quote: OK well now we need /acid to handle all of it's hallucinations

running_gags.description: Opus 4.6 telling users to go to sleep
Vibe coding as a legitimate development methodology
